description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle featuring a sleek, matte-black finish and a streamlined silhouette. It is equipped with a prominent telescopic scope mounted on the top rail, enhancing its precision for long-range targeting. The rifle has a suppressor attached to the end of its barrel, reducing muzzle flash and noise, making it suitable for stealth operations. The body includes a pistol grip and a fixed stock, providing ergonomic support and stability for the user. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, allowing for quick reloading. The overall design suggests a focus on tactical efficiency and urban utility, with robust metal and polymer construction.
description: A matte-black tactical rifle with a telescopic scope, suppressor, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine, designed for precision and stealth.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, suppressor, pistol grip, fixed stock, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's profile, scope, suppressor, and ergonomic grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the scope, with the suppressor extending forward.
